translations.en: a tough-looking woman with a walk like a troll.
translations.zh: 走路像山怪一樣的悍婦。

translations.en: She stares insolently at you.
translations.zh: 她傲慢地盯著你。

translations.en: "I'm Morchella."
translations.zh: 「我是摩切拉。」

translations.en: "I be a retired @sailor, that I am.
translations.zh: 「俺是退役的@sailor（水手），就是這樣。

translations.en: "Thou wert a @pirate!"
translations.zh: 「汝是個@pirate（海盜）！」

translations.en: "Well! How rude!" She turns up her nose and leaves.
translations.zh: 「哼！真是無禮！」她翹起鼻子，拂袖而去。

translations.en: An honest one, mind ye."
translations.zh: 一個誠實的水手，記著。」
translations.note: 接在 retired sailor 之後

translations.en: "I know nothing about that!" She walks off in a huff.
translations.zh: 「那種事俺一概不知！」她憤憤地走開。

translations.en: "That's right, me bucko. Why, I've sailed with Lord @British and Captain @John.
translations.zh: 「沒錯，夥計。俺可是跟@British（不列顛王）和@John（約翰）船長一同出過海的。

translations.en: "He walks with a limp, ye know. 'Fraid of mice, too, he is."
translations.zh: 「他走路一跛一跛的，你知道嗎。他也怕老鼠。」

translations.en: "He offered to marry me but of course I refused. Didn't want to be tied down."
translations.zh: 「他提出要娶俺，但俺當然拒絕了。不想被束縛。」

translations.en: She looks around furtively first. "Well, now, I might have seen the likes of that in me travels..."
translations.zh: 她先偷偷環顧四周。「嗯，這個嘛，俺的旅途中或許見過那種東西……」

translations.en: "Tell ye what, matey:"
translations.zh: 「俺跟你說，夥計：」

translations.en: "If ye give me a @shield of the Order of the Serpent, I'll tell ye where that map be at."
translations.zh: 「若你給俺一面蛇紋騎士團的@shield（盾），俺就告訴你那張地圖在哪。」

translations.en: "I might even ask 'im to marry me." She winks slyly at you.
translations.zh: 「俺甚至可能去求他娶俺。」她狡黠地向你眨眼。

translations.en: "So long, matey."
translations.zh: 「保重，夥計。」

translations.en: "Don't know what to say 'bout that, matey."
translations.zh: 「那個嘛，俺不知道說什麼，夥計。」

translations.en: "Now all I need is a magic sword; then methinks I'll be a knight."
translations.zh: 「現在俺只差一把魔法劍，到時俺就可以當騎士了。」

translations.en: "If I had a Silver Serpent shield, I'd give it to @Caradon."
translations.zh: 「若俺有銀蛇盾，俺會把它送給@Caradon（卡拉）頓。」

translations.en: "He's a fine, brave lad, he is."
translations.zh: 「他是個出色又勇敢的小伙子，是的。」

translations.en: "That be quite a prize there, matey. Will ye trade it to me for a bit o' map?"
translations.zh: 「那可是個好東西，夥計。願意拿它換俺的一片地圖嗎？」

translations.en: "Then leave me be!" She turns her back angrily on you and walks off.
translations.zh: 「那就別來煩俺！」她憤怒地背對你走開。

translations.en: From a little box Morchella hands over a piece of paper. It is a piece of the pirate map.
translations.zh: 摩切拉從一個小盒子裡取出一張紙遞給你。那是一片海盜地圖的碎片。

translations.en: "I was going to give this magic shield to Caradon, but methinks I'll keep it for meself instead!"
translations.zh: 「俺本想把這面魔法盾送給卡拉頓，但俺想俺還是自己留著算了！」

translations.en: "Good $T, $G." She walks off.
translations.zh: 「$T好，$G。」她走開了。

translator_notes: 摩切拉是退役水手（自稱），曾與不列顛王和約翰船長一同出海，拒絕了約翰船長的求婚。她手上有海盜地圖碎片，願意以銀蛇盾交換。她仰慕卡拉頓。口語粗獷，用「俺」。
